message:
🐛 Fix pill dropdown clipped by overflow-hidden on recommendation sections (#1756)

The expanded dropdown menus in Recommended Cards and Recommended Actions
pills were being clipped by `overflow-hidden` on their parent container.
Remove `overflow-hidden` from the interactive (non-skeleton) containers
so the absolutely-positioned dropdowns can render outside the section.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
